programme.title: KARNAVAL SCTV 2022
programme.desc: Karnaval SCTV is a flagship variety show produced routinely by SCTV. Traveling to a different region across Indonesia each month, the grand roadshow brings together SCTV's elite stars—ranging from top soap opera actors and magicians to renowned singers—masterfully blending mainstream entertainment with the unique cultural heritage of each local city it visits.

programme.title: GASPOL
programme.desc: Gaspol, an SCTV game show hosted by Raffi Ahmad, is filled with prizes and tens of millions of rupiah in cash.

programme.title: Pol PP Cantik Galaknya Bikin Candu
programme.desc: Dimas (Kenny Austin) is caught in a raid by Intan (Yuriska Patricia), who thinks he's a busker. It turns out Dimas isn't just any busker, but the future son-in-law of Burhan, Intan's commander.

programme.title: Ilmu Padi Mbakku Makin Berisi Makin Jadian
programme.desc: Juli (Nabila Zavira) and Romi (Naufal Samudra) fight over a motorbike taxi to get to the office, where they both work. Juli works as a security guard, while Romi works as a cleaning service. However, the more they see each other, the more they bicker.

programme.title: HOT SHOT
programme.desc: Program infotainment yang membahas kehidupan selebriti secara mendalam.

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. This season features a refreshed lineup of hosts, bringing together the dynamic chemistry of Ayu Dewi, Gilang Dirga, Arie Kriting, Andhika Pratama, and Uus to lead the hunt for Indonesia’s next comedy star.

programme.title: Cinta Abang Tamvan Pantang Disayurin
programme.desc: Nando (Morgan Oey) helps Sesil (Rayna Snova), who is about to be sold abroad. Nando asks his mother for permission to let Sesil stay at her house.

programme.title: Perawat Cinta Cantiknya Gak Ada Obat
programme.desc: Dimas (Kenny Austin) has just been in a single-car accident that resulted in a broken leg. An ambulance arrives to help him, along with a nurse named Luna (Larasati Nugroho). At the hospital, Dimas's mother wants Luna to care for him until he recovers.

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA
programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: Keliatan Banget Nyenggol Hati King Dosen
programme.desc: As Galang passed by, a man wearing the same jacket ran past him. Moments later, the man came chasing after Erin's purse snatcher. Galang was nearly beaten by the mob. Galang was accused of stealing Erin's wallet. Ultimately, Galang was saved and acquitted. Erin searched for the house address and managed to find Lalu, who introduced himself as Johan's son. programme.title: THE SULTAN ENTERTAINMENT
programme.desc: The Sultan is a talk show featuring two sultan-like hosts: Sultan Andara and Raffi Ahmad and Sultan Bintaro and Andre Taulany, accompanied by a cast of beautiful and handsome employees. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed. Find out more at The Sultan Entertainment.

programme.title: HIKMAH
programme.desc: A reality show that encapsulates everyday life stories, personal trials, and spiritual journeys. The program is rich in moral values, showcasing individuals as they navigate complex life dilemmas until they ultimately uncover the silver lining and wisdom behind every trial they endure

programme.title: Neng Pete Bau Cintanya Warbiyasah
programme.desc: Dania (Shanice Margaretha) sells petai chili sauce on campus. One day, she accidentally meets Kenny (Aliando Syarief), a rich kid. Kenny's father holds an important position on campus. However, Dania is upset by Kenny's actions, which resulted in him bumping into her and scattering his wares. Kenny doesn't accept this, and they get into an argument.

programme.title: Ketika Ada Yang Menyalakan Cintamu, Kamu Nanyea?
programme.desc: Eneng had to pretend to be crazy to date Dilan. Dilan is Abah Arga's grandson. Abah Arga set a condition for Dilan: he must marry a village girl in exchange for capital.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine — from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Heritage Trails: Eco Tourism Ep02
programme.desc: Heritage Trails: Eco Tourism follows two friends on an epic adventure across Sarawak, conquering Mount Singai, Mulu Pinnacle, and Mount Murud in a thrilling three-episode journey.

programme.title: Borneo Dive Ep08
programme.desc: Explore the unique dive sites of Sabah and Sarawak, which attract both local and international divers. The region offers a rich variety of marine life for recreational and avid divers to observe.

programme.desc: A local perspective on international and domestic affairs, TVS Sana Sini offers concise news stories the Weather Report, providing a look at climate and environmental conditions affecting the country

programme.title: Kek & Pastri Ep11

programme.desc: Nandini, a stunning village girl, works tirelessly out of deep devotion to her family. Meanwhile, fuelled by lingering resentment, Surya despises his mother & wilfully bonds with Nandini causing strife.

programme.title: Moodu Mullu (TG) Ep367
programme.desc: Neelaveni, a strong-willed girl, places her family's happiness above hers. On the other hand, Tarak harbors resentment towards his mother & deliberately weds Neelaveni to cause strife.

programme.title: Abhinandana (TG) Ep367
programme.desc: Despite growing apart, Rahul & Abhisarika have loved each other since childhood. By a twist of events, Abhisarika changes her looks to evade a forced marriage & later becomes engaged to Rahul.

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha (TG) Ep369
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Amme Mookambike (ML) Ep117
programme.desc: Karthika faces numerous challenges in her life. As she navigates these hardships, she finds solace and strength in the goddess Mookambika, who eventually intervenes to protect her and her family

programme.title: Sathya (TG) Ep29

programme.title: Ranga Ranga Pandu Ranga (TG) Ep189

programme.title: Nagamani (TG) Ep161
programme.desc: Tale of love between the shape-shifting naag - naagin and the never-ending greed of the evil witch seeking immortality by acquiring the life-giving jewel possessed by the naagin.

programme.title: Anju Sundarikal (ML) Ep22
programme.desc: Five friends move into a hostel ruled by a short-tempered warden, unaware of its sinister past; when they hide a charming stranger, comic chaos soon turns eerie.

programme.title: Honey Bee 2: Celebrations (ML) Ep54
programme.desc: When Angel's brothers decide to get her married to Sebastian, the cultural difference between their families creates problems for them.

programme.title: Sravana Sandhya (TG) Ep181

programme.title: Siva Rama Raju (TG) Ep111
programme.desc: Siva, Rama and Raju are brothers who dote on their sister, Swathy. She is married off to a rich, neighbouring family. But, the head of that family is a vengeful man looking to settle past scores.

programme.title: ADA DUA CINTA EPS 32
programme.desc: It tells the story of two girls, Mecca (who comes from humble circumstances) and Medina (who is wealthy), who are connected through Ayu—Mecca's biological mother—who adopted Medina. programme.title: THEATER DRAMA : ME VS DOKTER SALMON

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 15
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 92
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho

programme.title: KARENA AKU SAYANG 37
programme.desc: Kenzie is a man who has experienced countless traumatic events in his past.
